stemHtml: On an IFR approach in IMC, ATC instructs you to climb but you cannot acknowledge. Suspecting radio failure, what should you do?

options.a: Continue to destination, adding 500 ft to all flight plan altitudes.
options.b: Fly a low approach and watch for visual signals from ground personnel.
options.c: Select squawk 7700 and continue as per the filed flight plan.
options.d: Land within 30 minutes after the estimated time of arrival.
